creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Unfortunately erlang-runtime20 fails with the following messages:

crypto.c:4605:7: error: implicit declaration of function 'RSA_padding_add_SSLv23' is invalid in C99 [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                if (RSA_padding_add_SSLv23(tmp_bin.data, tmplen, in_bin.data, in_bin.size) <= 0)
                    ^
crypto.c:4605:7: warning: this function declaration is not a prototype [-Wstrict-prototypes]
crypto.c:4739:10: error: implicit declaration of function 'RSA_padding_check_SSLv23' is invalid in C99 [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
            i = RSA_padding_check_SSLv23(tmp_bin.data, tmplen, p, out_bin.size - 1, tmplen);
                ^
crypto.c:4739:10: note: did you mean 'RSA_padding_add_SSLv23'?
crypto.c:4605:7: note: 'RSA_padding_add_SSLv23' declared here
                if (RSA_padding_add_SSLv23(tmp_bin.data, tmplen, in_bin.data, in_bin.size) <= 0)
                    ^
crypto.c:4739:10: warning: this function declaration is not a prototype [-Wstrict-prototypes]
            i = RSA_padding_check_SSLv23(tmp_bin.data, tmplen, p, out_bin.size - 1, tmplen);

The above id difficult to read but there are two errors, one for 
RSA_padding_add_SSLv23
RSA_padding_check_SSLv23

Platform: FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE  r328914M amd64 
Fails to build using clang5.0.1 and gcc7 (7.3.0)

lang/erlang builds cleanly on both the i386 (openssl) and amd64 (libressl).  As you're aware there are substantial changes to 
/usr/ports/lang/erlang-runtime20/work/otp_src_20.2/lib/crypto/c_src/crypto.c

And I don't really know how to proceed.  If you're holding out on some of the erlang PR's for 20.4 it would be appreciated if you could advise. :)
